title: The Legend of Zelda Dungeon Theme on Mario Paint Composer
description:
My quickest and easiest yet, for I was time limited to do this. Took me less than half an hour to make (wow). A very simple yet catchy song that I hope you will enjoy. I hope to eventually cover all the major songs in this game.

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: FreezScreen Video Capture - (not recommended)

All free, legal, and unlimited.
